# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
	"$schema": "http://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2015-01-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
    "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
	"resources": [
		{
			"type":"Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
			"apiVersion":"2017-03-30",
			"name": "VM-Web",
			"location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
            "tags": {
		        "__application": "Web-Application"
		    },
		    "sku":{
		        "tier":"Standard",
                "size":"Standard_D4s_v3"
        	},
        	"dependsOn":[
        	    "Resource-Group-Name-VM",
	            "Vnet-VM-Name-Security-Group"
    	    ],
			"resources": [
				{
					"$ref": "#/resources/0" 
				}
			],
			"properties":{
                "hardwareProfile": {
                    "vmSize":"Standard_D4s_v3"
                },
                "storageProfile":{
                    "imageReference":{
                        "publisher":"MicrosoftWindowsServer",
                        "offer":"Windows-Server",
                        "sku":"2019-Datacenter",
                        "version":"latest"
                    },
                    "osDisk": {
                        "caching":"ReadWrite", 
                        "createOption":"fromImage",
                        "managedDiskType":"Standard_LRS"
                    }
                },
				"networkProfile":{
					"networkInterfaces":[
						{
							"$ref": "#/resources/0/properties/networkProfile/networkInterfaces/0" 
						}
					]
				},
                "osProfile": {
                    "computerName":"[parameters('Web-Application-VM-Name')]",
                    "adminUsername":"[parameters('Web-Application-AdminUserName')]",
                    "adminPassword":[
	                    "[secure('Web-Application-AdminPassword')]"
	                ],
                    "allowExtensionOperationsOnPlatformImages": true
                },
                "diagnosticsProfile":{
					"bootDiagnostics":{
						"enabled":true, 
						"storageUri":"[concat(parameters('Storage-Container-name'),'/','boot-log-web')]"
					}
				}
			},
            "plan": {
                "name": "[parameters('Web-Application-VM-PlanName')]",
                "publisher": "[parameters('Web-Application-VM-PlanPublisher')]",
                "product": "[parameters('Web-Application-VM-PlanProduct')]"
            }
		}
	]
}
